    • fork

      public TextureUtil fork()
      Description copied from class: TextureUtil
      Create a copy of this TextureUtil instance if required for thread safety.
      Overrides:
      fork in class DelegateTextureUtil
      Returns:
      either this TextureUtil instance if thread safe or a new copied instance.
